stages.prompt: One want I sacrificed for a need was ___.
One need I prioritized over a want was ___.
One way I can balance needs and wants is ___.
One benefit of prioritizing needs is ___.
One want I can budget for is ___.

result.winMessage: You completed {{score}} out of {{total}} entries! Great job reflecting on balancing needs and wants!
result.lesson: Lesson: Reflecting on your choices helps you balance needs and wants wisely!
result.loseMessage: You completed {{score}} out of {{total}} entries. Remember, balancing needs and wants is key to financial wellness!
result.tip: Tip: Think about times when you chose needs over wants, and how that helped you achieve your goals.
